You mention that you’re not really in the mood for anything naughty, but you’d love to curl up with some cocoa and her.

She bounces excitedly, “That sounds perfect, [pc.name]!” She immediately twirls around to the small folding table. “I, um, think there’s still enough batter for the cookies, and I r-rented a small heat-o-matic for baking them. I’ll um, work on them if you can get the cocoa started.”

You spend the next half hour with [embry.name], heating up milk and adding chunks of chocolate to it. As you work, cheerful, folksy music plays in the background, and the faux-frost on the walls twinkles in the firelight from a vid display.

Once she pops the cookies in the oven, [embry.name] cozies up against you in front of the heat-o-matic, adding ingredient after ingredient to the saucepan of thick, bubbling chocolate and whisking them together. You’re a little unsure about the dash of red pepper, she adds, but [embry.name] is surprisingly insistent about it.
“Um, it’s how we make it on Omorii,” she explains. “It makes sure the heat gets all the way down into your bones.”
Myrellion legitimately seems to be chilly this time of year, and even through the apartment walls, you swear you can feel it creeping in. You decide to trust [embry.name]’s expertise on it.

She pours the chocolate out of the saucepan into two mismatched mugs, handing you the one that proclaims that you “Went Ape on Primus X!” while she curls her fingers around one that establishes that it’s owner was the “Galaxy’s Best Simian.” Her tail curls around her to drop a cinnamon stick in each of your mugs before you walk towards her bed together.

The next few hours are spent sipping cocoa under a heavy blanket, chatting about small things and large. You fill her in on the adventures you’ve had since you last saw her, as she listens with wide-eyes and breathless excitement. You listen in awe as she talks a bit about growing up on her home planet, leaving out her homelife, but talking about the endless, open prairies of Omorii, and riding across them.

You break briefly as the heat-o-matic chimes, and you both emerge from the blanket to retrieve them from the oven as give them a dusting of powdered sugar. You laugh at the silliness that is [embry.name]’s pink, shark-shaped oven mitts, while she insists that they’re very cool.

You return to the blanket and spend another hour or so there, munching cookies and chatting the time away. The mugs of cocoa spent, you end up with [embry.name] curled against your chest, your fingers running through her hair as she nuzzles against your neck, making happily little sighs.
“I’m so happy you came, [pc.name]. Thank you,” she says, squeezing against you. “I miss you when you’re not around.”
You lean down and kiss her gently, bringing that familiar blush to her cheeks.
“Happy First Frost, [embry.name],” you say.
“Happy First Frost, [pc.name],” she replies, her smile practically glowing.
After a bit more time cuddling, you bid [embry.name] a fond farewell and head off to your ship.
Next
Waitress
You walk into the bar, glancing around, but don’t see [embry.name].

An ausar waitress bustles by, then glances at you. “Oh hey, are you Steele?” she stops short, balancing a tray of empty glasses on one arm. “If you’re looking for [embry.name], she’s off today. You should probably head to her place.”
